name_en: Exclusive photo M11436 Coussin small handbag made of fluffy lambskin, a trendy yet comfortable silhouette. Effortlessly style it from day to night. The chunky chain sparkles with iridescent hues, and the interior features a central zip pocket. Dimensions: 26 x 20 x 12 cm
